decisions.title_en: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in record Nasdaq ADR debut
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Largest-ever U.S. listing by a foreign company ($26.5B), priced July 9, debuted July 10; directly tied to the AI HBM memory buildup.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI merges Codex into ChatGPT desktop app, launches ChatGPT Work
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Distinct product story (app consolidation + ChatGPT Work agent) separate from the 07-09 'frontier-ai-simultaneous-launches' model-access story.

decisions.title_en: NYT-led publishers ask court to sanction OpenAI for hiding evidence
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. New July 9 court filing alleging OpenAI concealed internal corpus searches and a 78M-conversation database.

decisions.title_en: Micron raises U.S. investment plan to $250B through 2035
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. July 9 announcement lifting plan from $200B to $250B, first concrete poured at NY fab.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic brings Claude Cowork to mobile and web; 90% of usage isn't coding
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. July 7 mobile/web rollout plus striking usage data from 1.2M sessions (only 8.7% software dev).

decisions.title_en: SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, wins JPMorgan as inference partner
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. July 8 Series F first close, General Atlantic-led, JPMorgan on-prem inference deal.

decisions.title_en: Imperial College workshop tests AI autoformalization on Fermat's Last Theorem
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. July 6-10 workshop, Logos Research-funded, probing whether AI can formalize FLT prerequisites in Lean.
event_date 2026-03-31 is 102 days old (>5 day limit). Only resurfacing in July recaps.
event_date 2026-07-01 is 10 days old (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: Reflection AI activates $6.3B Colossus 2 compute lease
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-07-01 is 10 days old (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: Amazon custom silicon business tops $20B run rate
decisions.reason: Underlying event is the Q1 2026 earnings call (Apr 30), 72 days old (>5 day limit). July coverage is re-reporting.

decisions.title_en: Meta lays off 8,000 in AI restructuring; Zuckerberg says AI 'hasn't accelerated'
decisions.reason: Layoffs event dates to May 2026 (>5 days). July 2 town-hall remark is a minor follow-up, not a substantive new development.

decisions.title_en: White House nears voluntary frontier AI release standards
decisions.reason: No concrete July event; grounded in June 2 Executive Order 14409, and standards remain in 'advanced talks' with no announcement yet.

decisions.title_en: Israeli AI detects brain bleeding before doctors
decisions.reason: No discrete July 10 event; the capability (Aidoc ICH detection) is evergreen, already-deployed tech resurfacing in a roundup rather than fresh news.

decisions.title_en: Grok 4.5 benchmark rankings and token-efficiency claims
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-09 as 'AI模型扎堆发布日' covering GPT-5.6 Sol, Grok 4.5, Muse Spark. July 10 benchmark placements are incremental scoring, not a substantive new development.
